meta.title: Vendi — Your online store, live in minutes
meta.description: Vendi by Olcas: create your business's online store in minutes. Premium catalog, real-time orders and built-in card payments.

common.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle: Your online store, live in minutes.
landing.heroSubtitle: For any business: restaurants, fashion, crafts, services. A beautiful catalog, real-time orders and card payments. No coding required.
landing.trustedBy: The serious way to sell online, without the hassle
landing.step1Text: Sign up, name it, and your store has its own link. Truly in minutes.
landing.step2Text: Photos, prices and stock. A premium-finish catalog you'll love to share.
landing.step3Text: Every order lands instantly on your panel and card payments go to your account.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.feature1Text: Your panel is a live register: every sale arrives instantly, no refreshing, no waiting for emails.
landing.feature2Text: Card payments through Stripe, with invoices and taxes calculated automatically.
landing.feature3Text: You set your store's shipping price. No imposed carriers, no surprises.
landing.feature4Text: Start with your Vendi link and connect your own domain whenever you want (Pro plan).
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your business asks for it.
landing.finalCtaTitle: Your business deserves a serious store.
landing.finalCtaText: Join Vendi and publish your catalog today.

auth.registerSubtitle: Start free and launch your first store today
auth.name: Name
auth.registerError: Couldn't create the account. Check your details.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a link to create a new one
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a link in a few minutes.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.resetError: The link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verifiedOk: Email verified successfully. You can sign in now.
auth.verifiedFail: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.title: Your stores
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your stores, products and orders.
dashboard.noStores: You don't have any store yet. Create your first one:
dashboard.newStoreSubtitle: Give it a name and start selling in minutes.
dashboard.createStoreError: Couldn't create the store. Check your details.
dashboard.noOrders: No orders yet. Share your store to start selling.
dashboard.addProductError: Couldn't create the product. Check your details.
dashboard.dangerText: Your personal data will be deleted and your stores will be unpublished. Orders are kept anonymized for tax obligations. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action is final.
dashboard.billingFreeText: You're on the Free plan: 1 store, 10 products and a 3% fee per sale.
dashboard.billingProText: You're Pro: unlimited stores and products with only a 1% fee.
dashboard.billingSuccess: Welcome to Vendi Pro! Your account is now upgraded.
dashboard.billingCancelled: Payment cancelled. You're still on the Free plan.
dashboard.billingUnavailable: Payments will be available very soon.
dashboard.planLimit: You've reached your plan's limit. Go Pro to unlock unlimited.
dashboard.paymentsText: Connect Stripe so your customers can pay by card. Vendi only keeps its per-sale fee.
dashboard.shippingText: Flat shipping price added to every order. Set 0 if shipping is free.

store.noProducts: This store doesn't have products yet.
store.orderDone: Order sent! The store will get in touch with you.
store.orderError: Couldn't send the order. Please try again.
store.paidSuccess: Payment completed! Thank you for your purchase.
store.paidCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again anytime.
